sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_dates (id UInt32, date_value Date, datetime_value DateTime, string_date_value String, value Float64);
INSERT INTO test_dates VALUES (2, toDate('2024-03-01'), toDateTime(NULL), '2024-04-01', NULL);

SELECT id, subtractQuarters(date_value, 1) AS adjusted_date, subtractQuarters(datetime_value, 1) AS adjusted_datetime, subtractQuarters(string_date_value, 2) AS adjusted_string_date FROM test_dates WHERE adjust_date NOT LIKE '2023-12-31';
SELECT id, date_value, datetime_value, string_date_value, subtractQuarters(date_value, CAST(NULL AS UInt32)) AS null_quarters FROM test_dates WHERE null_quarters IS NULL;
SELECT id, value, subtractQuarters(datetime_value, 1) AS adjusted_datetime FROM test_dates WHERE value > 0 AND adjusted_datetime NOT LIKE '2024-01-15 00:00:00';
WITH (SELECT subtractQuarters(date_value, 4) FROM test_dates WHERE id = 1) AS quarter_sub FROM test_dates WHERE quarter_sub NOT LIKE '2023-09-30';
CREATE TABLE temp_dates AS SELECT id, subtractQuarters(date_value, 2) AS two_quarters_back FROM test_dates WHERE value IS NOT NULL;
SELECT id, COUNT(*) FROM temp_dates GROUP BY two_quarters_back HAVING two_quarters_back NOT LIKE '2023-12-01';
ALTER TABLE test_dates ADD COLUMN new_date_value Date DEFAULT subtractQuarters(date_value, 3);
SELECT id, subtractQuarters(date_value, -2) AS add_quarters, subtractQuarters(NULL, 1) AS null_case FROM test_dates;
